work_unit: SZ-SH-M-003: enable sourcemaps in esbuild minification
situation: Derived fix from audit-2026-07-07-047 finding SZ-SH-M-003. All three esbuild calls (sidepanel, popup, background) in build.mjs had minify:true without sourcemap option, making production debugging impossible. opt-shared-1783413612 already had diverged build.mjs from prior SZ-SH-M-002 CSP fix, so used case-104 escape hatch to edit and commit directly in worktree.
action: Added sourcemap:true to all three esbuild build calls (sidepanel.js, popup.js, background.js). This emits .js.map files alongside minified bundles, enabling source-level debugging in Chrome DevTools for production extension builds.
outcome_evidence: Commit 0dffc33 on auto/opt-shared-1783413612, pushed to origin. git diff shows +3 lines (sourcemap:true added to 3 esbuild configs).
next_suggestion: SZ-SH-M-005: preprocessForVL tests only cover passthrough path; compression branch untested
SZ-SH-M-006: @crxjs/vite-plugin beta dependency unused in actual build pipeline
SZ-BG-L-001: IndexedDB connection opened per-operation but never closed

audit_findings.finding: esbuild minification without sourcemaps makes production debugging impossible
audit_findings.remediation: Add sourcemap:true to all esbuild build configurations
